output: Implemented batch T1 in the resize math layer. `src/tools/video-editor/lib/resize-math.ts` now exports `ClipEdgeResizeContext`, `applyClipEdgeMove`, and `snapBoundaryToSiblings`, with the dispatcher reusing `computeGroupChildBoundaryResize` and `computeGroupEdgeResize` for interior and outer paths and normalizing free/interior/outer results into clip update arrays. `src/tools/video-editor/lib/resize-math.test.ts` now covers free, interior, and outer dispatcher behavior plus clamp and snap cases. Verified by running the full `resize-math` test module successfully.
